events.text: I’ll verify the standard anchors before writing the JSON, since this hinges on current masonry flashing and weep requirements rather than a visual preference.

events.label: assistant
events.text: The relevant requirement is functional: flashing and weeps must form a continuous drainage path that resists water penetration. An unsealed or unlapped flashing condition defeats that at rough-complete, so I’m recording it as a failed inspection item with corrective action before close-in.
